titleStmt.title: SII 24.388: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 388. (A.R. No. 28 of 1938-39.) II PRĀKĀRA, NORTH WALL, 1ST TIER, EAST END

summary.p: Registers the investment of 40 poṉ from the interest on which certain offerings are to be made to god Raṅganātha, while he halts at the garden of Kuppayyaṉ alias Nārāyaṇan, son of Tiruvāḻi-Āḻvān of the Kauśika-gōtra, on the fourth day during the festival in the month of Chittirai. A share of the offerings is to go to Kuppayyā-piḷḷai, obviously the donor. The record begins with a ślōka in Sanskrit, the continuation of which is lost in the masonry. The date viz. Śaka 1451, Virōdhin, Mēsha. ba. 9, Friday, Śravaṇa corresponds to A.D. 1529, April 2, Friday, f.d.t. 0·8, f.d.n. ·00.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . śrī raṅgarājasya sudarśanānujo nārāyaṇaḥ kośyapa kuppayāhvayaḥ . cakre caturtthehani caitrautsa� . kka tārakam . svasti śrī śakābdam 1000 4 100 5 10 1ṉ mel cellāniṉṟa virodhi samvatsarattu meṣanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu navamiyum śukravāramum peṟṟa śravaṇanakṣatrattunāḷ kauśikagotrattu Ābastamba sūtrattu tiruvāḻi Āḻvāṉ putran kuppayyanāmadheyaṉāṉa nārāyaṇaśarmmāvinuṭaiya tiruttoppukku perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthatevar cittiraittiruṉāḷ nālān tirunāḷ Eḻuntaruḷi Irupatu cāttuppaṭiyum Oṉṟaraippaṇattiṉ Ilaiyamutu Aṭaikkāyamutum Aṉ
patu kūṉ veccamutum Āṟukala poriyamutum muṉṉūṟu Atirasamum muṉṉūṟu vaṭaiyum muṉṉūṟu sukhiyaṉum Aṉpatu taḷikaiyum Eḷaniramutum A Built in. ḷḷai poliyūṭṭākak koyil paṇṭārattile nāṟpatu poṉ celittiṉapaṭiyāle Intap poṉṉil vṛddhiyile varṣam(n) toṟum Intattiruttoppukku Eḻuntaruḷi ciṟappu Amutu ceytaruḷumpaṭi candrādityavaraiyum Intattiruttopputtiruṉāḷ kaṇṭaruḷak kaṭavarākavum viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu nālattoṉṟum Intak kuppayyāpiḷḷai peṟakkaṭavarākavum . śubhamastu .
Digital edition of SII 24.388 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
